articles.description: Sucker Punch on supernatural battles, surprising synergies and players finishing the story.
articles.content: Launched last month, the Ghost of Ytei Legends Raid forms the endgame of Sucker Punchs multiplayer mode, as Ghosts face off against the last two of the supernatural Ytei Six, The Dragon and Lord Sait… [+7906 chars]
